name_en: 5BC158: Miu Miu new arrival, classic Matelasse craftsmanship, top-grade imported lambskin. The refined 3D bag shape and premium texture reinterpret the soft charm of this calfskin handbag. The craftsmanship and design fuse many of Miu Miu's most unique signature elements. Equipped with an adjustable leather shoulder strap, offering multiple carrying styles to add to its fashion appeal and modern style. Cotton satin lining included. Size: 24×11.5×7cm💕(with original packaging)
